- [2026-04-28] [2026-04-28] Geopolitical shifts in the oil market: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced its departure from OPEC effective May 1, 2026, signaling a major structural fracture in global oil supply coordination. Concurrently, an active conflict involving Iran and uncertainty in the Strait of Hormuz has injected a massive risk premium into WTI and Brent crude prices, overshadowing traditional supply-demand fundamentals.
